title: Ores In Trees
description: A mod about Ores in Trees!
body:
# ORES IN TREES

_**Your world is different, these trees with their livelier leaves now appear in your world to tell you that nature always manages to impress.**_

Now incredible trees can appear in your world to help you on your adventure!

![Ores in Tree Print 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4fd4929fde30d4b1c83ef88704e1c2617d3b0cbd.png)

At the moment you can find trees made of
- Coal
- Iron
- Copper
- Redstone
- Quartz
- Emerald
- Lapis Lazuli
- Diamond

![Ores in Tree Print 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ae94cc8683ccdb4126461b8af97f85fa19efe9f7.png)

_Now what do you do after finding one of these wonders of the world?_

You can now go crafting with 9 of these logs to form 1 block of the same ore!

![BlockIron](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7eb76a15546915999385f07c9f89ea74b1cd38fe.png)

This applies to all the ore trees you find in your world!

In the future there will be updates and other types of ores such as Amethyst or simple ores such as Clay will be added..

![LapisTree](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7c90314872528ef7f478c4d0c9a967293c5928e6.png)

I hope you enjoy it!
